div.head: The Chinese Ambassador (Wei) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: Referring to my note of August 14, 1944Not printed. giving a list of persons to participate at the informal conference on the International Organization for Peace and Security with the representatives of the United States and of the United Kingdom, I have the honor to inform you that the Chinese Government has appointed Dr. V. K. Wellington Koo, Ambassador to the United Kingdom; Dr. Wei Tao-Ming, Ambassador to the United States of America; Dr. Victor Chi-Tsai Hoo, Vice Minister of Foreign Affairs; and General Shang Chen, Chief of the Military Mission to the United States as Delegates to attend the Conference and has designated Dr. Koo to be the Chairman of the Delegation.
